mapper.select: SELECT t.TRX_ID AS trxId, t.OPER_MODE_TYPE AS operModeType, t.TRX_STOP_YN AS trxStopYn, t.TRX_NAME AS trxName, t.TRX_DESC AS trxDesc, t.TRX_TYPE AS trxType, t.RETRY_TRX_YN AS retryTrxYn, t.MAX_RETRY_COUNT AS maxRetryCount, t.RETRY_MI_CYCLE AS retryMiCycle, t.BIZ_GROUP_ID AS bizGroupId, t.BIZDAY_TRX_YN AS bizdayTrxYn, t.BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME AS bizdayTrxStartTime, t.BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME AS bizdayTrxEndTime, t.SATURDAY_TRX_YN AS saturdayTrxYn, t.SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME AS saturdayTrxStartTime, t.SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME AS saturdayTrxEndTime, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_YN AS holidayTrxYn, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME AS holidayTrxStartTime, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME AS holidayTrxEndTime, t.TRX_STOP_REASON AS trxStopReason FROM FWK_TRX t WHERE t.TRX_ID = #{trxId}

SELECT t.TRX_ID AS trxId, t.TRX_NAME AS trxName, t.TRX_STOP_YN AS trxStopYn FROM FWK_TRX t WHERE t.TRX_ID IN
#{trxId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_TRX ( TRX_ID, OPER_MODE_TYPE, TRX_STOP_YN, TRX_NAME, TRX_DESC, TRX_TYPE, RETRY_TRX_YN, MAX_RETRY_COUNT, RETRY_MI_CYCLE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, BIZDAY_TRX_YN, BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME, BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_YN, SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_YN, HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME, TRX_STOP_REASON ) VALUES ( #{dto.trxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.operModeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxStopYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.retryTrxYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.maxRetryCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dto.retryMiCycle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayTrxYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayTrxStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.bizdayTrxEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayTrxYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayTrxStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.saturdayTrxEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayTrxYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayTrxStartTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.holidayTrxEndTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.trxStopReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_TRX WHERE TRX_ID = #{trxId}
SELECT t.TRX_ID AS trxId, t.TRX_NAME AS trxName FROM FWK_TRX t ORDER BY t.TRX_ID

choose.when: AND (UPPER(tmReq.MESSAGE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%' OR UPPER(tmRes.MESSAGE_ID) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%')

mapper.sql: FROM FWK_TRX t LEFT JOIN FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tmReq ON t.TRX_ID = tmReq.TRX_ID AND tmReq.IO_TYPE = 'I' LEFT JOIN FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tmRes ON t.TRX_ID = tmRes.TRX_ID AND tmRes.IO_TYPE = 'O' LEFT JOIN FWK_ORG o ON tmReq.ORG_ID = o.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE mReq ON tmReq.ORG_ID = mReq.ORG_ID AND tmReq.MESSAGE_ID = mReq.MESSAGE_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE mRes ON tmRes.ORG_ID = mRes.ORG_ID AND tmRes.MESSAGE_ID = mRes.MESSAGE_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE mStdReq ON tmReq.ORG_ID = mStdReq.ORG_ID AND tmReq.STD_MESSAGE_ID = mStdReq.MESSAGE_ID LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE mStdRes ON tmRes.ORG_ID = mStdRes.ORG_ID AND tmRes.STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID = mStdRes.MESSAGE_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT t.TRX_ID as trxId, t.TRX_NAME as trxName, t.TRX_STOP_YN as trxStopYn, t.RETRY_TRX_YN as autoManualType, tmReq.ORG_ID as orgId, o.ORG_NAME as orgName, tmReq.MESSAGE_ID as reqMessageId, mReq.MESSAGE_NAME as reqMessageName, tmRes.MESSAGE_ID as resMessageId, mRes.MESSAGE_NAME as resMessageName, tmReq.STD_MESSAGE_ID as stdReqMessageId, mStdReq.MESSAGE_NAME as stdReqMessageName, tmRes.STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID as stdResMessageId, mStdRes.MESSAGE_NAME as stdResMessageName, NVL(tmReq.PROXY_RES_YN, tmRes.PROXY_RES_YN) as proxyResYn, NVL(tmReq.MULTI_RES_YN, tmRes.MULTI_RES_YN) as multiResYn
ORDER BY
t.TRX_ID t.TRX_NAME o.ORG_NAME t.TRX_STOP_YN t.TRX_ID
ASC DESC ASC
SELECT DISTINCT BIZ_GROUP_ID FROM FWK_TRX WHERE BIZ_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY BIZ_GROUP_ID

SELECT t.TRX_ID as trxId, t.OPER_MODE_TYPE as operModeType, t.TRX_STOP_YN as trxStopYn, t.TRX_NAME as trxName, t.TRX_DESC as trxDesc, t.TRX_TYPE as trxType, t.RETRY_TRX_YN as retryTrxYn, t.MAX_RETRY_COUNT as maxRetryCount, t.RETRY_MI_CYCLE as retryMiCycle, t.BIZ_GROUP_ID as bizGroupId, t.BIZDAY_TRX_YN as bizdayTrxYn, t.BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME as bizdayTrxStartTime, t.BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME as bizdayTrxEndTime, t.SATURDAY_TRX_YN as saturdayTrxYn, t.SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME as saturdayTrxStartTime, t.SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME as saturdayTrxEndTime, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_YN as holidayTrxYn, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME as holidayTrxStartTime, t.HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME as holidayTrxEndTime, t.TRX_STOP_REASON as trxStopReason FROM FWK_TRX t WHERE t.TRX_ID = #{trxId}

SELECT tm.TRX_ID as trxId, tm.ORG_ID as orgId, tm.IO_TYPE as ioType, tm.MESSAGE_ID as messageId, tm.STD_MESSAGE_ID as stdMessageId, tm.RES_MESSAGE_ID as resMessageId, tm.STD_RES_MESSAGE_ID as stdResMessageId, tm.PROXY_RES_YN as proxyResYn, tm.PROXY_RES_DATA as proxyResData, tm.EXECUTE_SEQ as executeSeq, tm.PROXY_RES_TYPE as proxyResType, tm.HEX_LOG_YN as hexLogYn, tm.MULTI_RES_YN as multiResYn, tm.RES_TYPE_FIELD_ID as resTypeFieldId, tm.MULTI_RES_TYPE as multiResType, tm.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME as lastUpdateDtime, tm.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID as lastUpdateUserId, tm.TIMEOUT_SEC as timeoutSec, tm.LEGACY_MESSAGE_ID as legacyMessageId, m.MESSAGE_NAME as messageName FROM FWK_TRX_MESSAGE tm LEFT JOIN FWK_MESSAGE m ON tm.ORG_ID = m.ORG_ID AND tm.MESSAGE_ID = m.MESSAGE_ID WHERE tm.TRX_ID = #{trxId} ORDER BY tm.ORG_ID, tm.IO_TYPE, tm.EXECUTE_SEQ
mapper.sql: FROM FWK_TRX t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TRX_ID, COUNT(*) as accessUserCount FROM FWK_ACCESS_USER GROUP BY TRX_ID ) au_cnt ON t.TRX_ID = au_cnt.TRX_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT t.TRX_ID as trxId, t.TRX_NAME as trxName, t.OPER_MODE_TYPE as operModeType, t.TRX_TYPE as trxType, t.RETRY_TRX_YN as retryTrxYn, t.TRX_STOP_YN as trxStopYn, t.TRX_STOP_REASON as trxStopReason, COALESCE(au_cnt.accessUserCount, 0) as accessUserCount
ORDER BY
t.TRX_ID t.TRX_NAME t.OPER_MODE_TYPE t.TRX_TYPE t.TRX_STOP_YN t.TRX_ID
ASC DESC ASC

SELECT t.TRX_ID as trxId, t.TRX_NAME as trxName, t.TRX_STOP_YN as trxStopYn, t.RETRY_TRX_YN as autoManualType, tmReq.ORG_ID as orgId, o.ORG_NAME as orgName, tmReq.MESSAGE_ID as reqMessageId, mReq.MESSAGE_NAME as reqMessageName, tmRes.MESSAGE_ID as resMessageId, mRes.MESSAGE_NAME as resMessageName, NVL(tmReq.PROXY_RES_YN, tmRes.PROXY_RES_YN) as proxyResYn, NVL(tmReq.MULTI_RES_YN, tmRes.MULTI_RES_YN) as multiResYn
ORDER BY t.TRX_ID ASC

SELECT t.TRX_ID as trxId, t.TRX_NAME as trxName, t.OPER_MODE_TYPE as operModeType, t.TRX_TYPE as trxType, t.RETRY_TRX_YN as retryTrxYn, t.TRX_STOP_YN as trxStopYn, t.TRX_STOP_REASON as trxStopReason, COALESCE(au_cnt.accessUserCount, 0) as accessUserCount
ORDER BY t.TRX_ID ASC
